ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - NVIDIA Tool
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]RimSynapse - NVIDIA Tool[/h1] [b]?? [url=https://github.com/RimSynapse/RimSynapse-NVIDIA-Tool/wiki]Official Wiki and Documentation[/url][/b]
[b]Real-Time GPU Monitoring and LLM Performance Dashboard for RimSynapse.[/b]
This developer and power-user tool provides a comprehensive overview of your local GPU's health, VRAM usage, and LLM request performance — all rendered directly inside RimWorld's UI.
[h2]Core Systems[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Live GPU Monitoring:[/b] Reads NVIDIA GPU stats via nvidia-smi in real-time. Displays VRAM usage, GPU temperature, utilization percentage, and power draw. [*] [b]VRAM Breakdown:[/b] Shows a detailed breakdown of estimated VRAM consumption: model size, KV cache, context window, and overhead. Helps you understand exactly where your GPU memory is going. [*] [b]VRAM Warnings:[/b] Proactive alerts when your GPU is approaching VRAM limits, with recommendations for model sizes and context window adjustments. [*] [b]Request Metrics:[/b] Tracks every LLM request made by RimSynapse mods — response times, token counts, throughput (tokens/second), and queue depth. Identifies bottlenecks in your AI pipeline. [*] [b]In-Game Overlay HUD:[/b] A toggleable on-screen overlay that displays GPU stats, request queue status, and active model information without opening any menus. [*] [b]Developer Tools Window:[/b] A comprehensive debug window with tabs for GPU stats, request history, VRAM analysis, and configuration. Essential for mod developers building on RimSynapse. [/list]
[h2]Toolbar Integration[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Quick Toggle:[/b] A toolbar button lets you instantly toggle the GPU overlay and open the developer tools window. [/list]
[h2]Default Settings (adjustable in-game)[/h2] [code] Overlay Enabled: false (Toggle the on-screen GPU HUD) nvidia-smi Poll Interval: 2000ms (How often GPU stats are refreshed) Request History Length: 100 (Number of recent LLM requests to keep in the metrics log) [/code]
[h2]Requirements[/h2] [list] [*] [b]RimSynapse Core[/b] (Must be loaded before this mod) [*] An NVIDIA GPU with nvidia-smi available on PATH (automatically detected). [/list]
[h2]Note[/h2] This tool is optional and purely diagnostic. It does not affect gameplay. It is intended for users who want to monitor their hardware while running local LLMs alongside RimWorld.
[h2]Support the Project[/h2] [url=https://buymeacoffee.com/archdukejim]? Buy me a coffee[/url]
